case_title: NUVIA CLARIBEL SEGURA TURCIOS VS. MARIA ZUNIGA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED JUN-07-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, MARIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY SEGURA TURCIOS, NUVIA CLARIBEL AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FROM JAN-16-2019 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON SEP-12-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEGURA TURCIOS, NUVIA CLARIBEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, MARIA $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEGURA TURCIOS, NUVIA CLARIBEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO ADVANCE TRIAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-16-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF NUVIA TURCIOS IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. DEFENDANT MARIA ZUNIGA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. UPON CALLING THE CASE, PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE JANUARY 2019 HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
